title: SPARTA Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Allocation Baseline Spec v1
research_objective: Pin the EXACT method, inputs, and constraints for each Portfolio Capital-Efficiency allocation baseline -- the reference models a future advisory memo would compare. This bundle is spec/framework-only: it defines HOW each baseline WOULD assign advisory research weights over FROZEN admissible strategies (per the P1 Input Contract, using the P2 metrics); it computes NO real allocation, deploys NO capital, and produces NO real portfolio result. Computation is a separate, separately-authorized bundle.

verdict_ceiling_rules.rationale: Downstream, advisory allocation baselines inherit the upstream registries' WATCH ceiling and must never imply readiness not earned.

c10_boundary.note: This spec does not read, connect to, or depend on Candidate #10 indicator results. C10 remains deferred until it has its own FROZEN, committed replay artifact; only then does it become an ordinary admissible strategy under the P1 rules. Never the working tree.

shared_symbols.S_admissible: Set of strategies admissible under the P1 Input Contract (committed + frozen + checksummed + version-pinned, WATCH-ceiled).
shared_symbols.S_inadmissible: Set of strategies that are inadmissible (unfrozen / uncommitted / unpinned / bypassed-verdict); these receive weight 0 by rule.
shared_symbols.w_i: Advisory research weight of strategy i (never an execution size). 0 <= w_i; sum over all strategies + cash bucket == 1.
shared_symbols.sigma_i: standalone_risk of strategy i (P1 frozen field).
shared_symbols.L: Pre-declared concentration cap in (0, 1] (operator scalar constant; never inferred).
shared_symbols.B: Pre-declared total capital-at-risk envelope (operator scalar constant; never inferred).
shared_symbols.w_cash: Weight of the cash / unallocated bucket; absorbs any residual and is the full allocation when no strategy qualifies.
shared_symbols.MCE_i: marginal_capital_efficiency rank of strategy i, supplied by the P2 metric (+ future P4 correlation); RANKING ONLY.

allocation_baselines.label: Equal weight per admissible strategy
allocation_baselines.method: For each strategy i in S_admissible: w_i = 1 / |S_admissible|. Strategies in S_inadmissible get w_i = 0. If S_admissible is empty, the whole allocation falls to w_cash (see cash_unallocated_bucket).
validation_rules: Only P1-admissible strategies receive weight; inadmissible strategies are zero by rule.
If |S_admissible| would push any w_i above L, the capped_concentration baseline applies instead and the excess routes to cash.

allocation_baselines.label: Equal risk per strategy (inverse-volatility / risk parity)
allocation_baselines.method: For each strategy i in S_admissible with sigma_i > 0: raw_i = 1 / sigma_i ; w_i = raw_i / sum_{j in S_admissible} raw_j. Inadmissible strategies get w_i = 0. A strategy with missing or non-positive sigma_i is UNDEFINED and excluded (flagged), never assigned an inferred risk.
validation_rules: sigma_i must come from a FROZEN admissible report (P1 standalone_risk).
sigma_i <= 0 or missing => strategy excluded + flagged (UNDEFINED over silent default).
Risk-parity weights remain subject to the concentration cap L and the budget B.

allocation_baselines.label: Capped concentration per strategy
allocation_baselines.method: Start from a base allocation (equal_weight or equal_risk). Clip each w_i to the pre-declared cap L: w_i' = min(w_i, L). Re-distribute the clipped excess across uncapped admissible strategies pro-rata, iterating until no strategy exceeds L. Any residual that cannot be placed without breaching L routes to w_cash.
validation_rules: L is operator-declared in (0, 1]; never inferred from data.
Per-candidate, per-asset, and per-family shares all respect L (uses the P2 concentration_limit definition).
Unplaceable residual goes to cash, never silently over-concentrated.

allocation_baselines.label: Zero allocation for inadmissible / unfrozen strategies
allocation_baselines.method: For every strategy i in S_inadmissible (unfrozen, uncommitted, unpinned, or surfacing a bypassed PASS/ACTIVE/STRONG verdict): w_i = 0, unconditionally. This rule overrides every other baseline.
validation_rules: No baseline may assign positive weight to an inadmissible strategy.
Candidate #10 is currently inadmissible (deferred, not frozen) and therefore receives weight 0 under this rule.
Admissibility is decided solely by the P1 Input Contract.

allocation_baselines.label: Ranking-only allocation using future marginal capital efficiency
allocation_baselines.method: Rank admissible strategies by MCE_i (P2 marginal_capital_efficiency, descending). The ranking informs a HUMAN ordering of which strategies merit more research attention; it is NEVER converted into automatic weights or execution sizes. Any weights a human later assigns from this ranking still pass through zero_for_inadmissible + capped_concentration + the budget B.
validation_rules: RANKING ONLY: produces an ordering, not weights; never auto-sizes capital.
MCE_i is supplied by the P2 metric (+ future P4 correlation); not computed in this bundle.
Inherits the WATCH ceiling; never surfaces PASS/ACTIVE/STRONG.

allocation_baselines.label: Cash / unallocated bucket when no strategy qualifies
allocation_baselines.method: A cash / unallocated bucket with weight w_cash absorbs every residual: w_cash = 1 - sum_i w_i over all strategies. If S_admissible is empty (no strategy qualifies), w_cash = 1 (full unallocated). w_cash is never negative.
validation_rules: When no strategy is admissible, the entire advisory allocation is cash (w_cash = 1) -- the framework never forces capital onto an unqualified strategy.
w_cash absorbs clipped concentration excess and budget headroom; it is never negative.
Cash is an advisory placeholder, not a deployed cash position.

allocation_constraints.weights_sum_to_one_incl_cash: Sum of all strategy weights + w_cash == 1.
allocation_constraints.long_only_research_weights: No negative advisory weights at this stage (no shorting the bench); 0 <= w_i.
allocation_constraints.inadmissible_weight_zero: Every P1-inadmissible strategy receives weight 0 (zero_for_inadmissible rule is absolute).
allocation_constraints.concentration_cap_L_enforced: No candidate / asset / family grouping share exceeds the pre-declared cap L (P2 concentration_limit).
allocation_constraints.capital_at_risk_budget_B_respected: Total advisory capital-at-risk stays within B (P2 capital_at_risk_budget); excess routes to cash.
allocation_constraints.frozen_admissible_inputs_only: All inputs are FROZEN admissible fields per P1; live / networked / uncommitted inputs are inadmissible.
allocation_constraints.no_lookahead: No baseline uses information unavailable at the decision time of the underlying frozen report.
allocation_constraints.reproducibility: Same frozen inputs + same pre-declared constants reproduce the same advisory weights bit-for-bit.
allocation_constraints.no_real_allocation_in_this_bundle: This bundle computes NO real allocation, deploys NO capital, and emits NO real portfolio result.

pass_watch_fail_rules.PASS: A future allocation run is PASS-grade FOR REVIEW only when: it uses a defined baseline; every input is FROZEN + admissible (P1); inadmissible strategies are zero; weights (incl. cash) sum to one and are long-only; no grouping breaches L; total capital-at-risk stays within B; the marginal-efficiency baseline is used for ranking only; outputs respect the WATCH ceiling; and the run reproduces bit-for-bit. PASS means 'advisory weights fit for human review', never 'deploy' or 'execute'.
pass_watch_fail_rules.WATCH: Allocation computable but borderline (thin admissible set, much weight routed to cash, an accepted UNDEFINED/excluded strategy, sparse P4 correlation for the ranking); documented and re-checked.
pass_watch_fail_rules.FAIL: Any inadmissible strategy gets positive weight; weights do not sum to one or go negative; a grouping breaches L; the budget B is exceeded without routing to cash; the marginal-efficiency ranking was used to auto-size; or the WATCH ceiling was bypassed.

required_future_artifacts: Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Overlap/Correlation Method v1 (P4) -- supplies rho_ij used by equal_risk refinements + the marginal-efficiency ranking; spec only.
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Advisory Memo Schema v1 (P5) -- finalises the advisory report schema that hosts these baselines; spec only.
A separately-authorized COMPUTE bundle that actually runs these baselines over frozen admissible inputs and emits an advisory allocation report.
Lane closeout memo if the capital-efficiency idea PARKs / RETIREs.
safety_boundaries: Research-only. Advisory-only. Allocation baseline spec / framework only.
No broker control, no exchange connection, no API keys, no .env, no credential handling.
No live trading. No live capital allocation. No capital deployment. No paper-order execution. No order placement. No order sizing for execution.
No scheduler / background daemon. No external network calls in this spec's runtime.
No real allocation computed in this bundle. No real portfolio result produced. No data fetch, no detector, no replay, no backtest.
Do not modify paper / live execution files. Do not read Candidate #10 working-tree files, tests, labels, replay, or detector.
Candidate #10 remains deferred and is not connected by this spec; C10 must finish and freeze by itself first.
Consume only FROZEN, committed, admissible artifacts; never live positions or uncommitted working trees.
Do not claim profitability. Do not claim live-readiness. Do not claim STRONG evidence from this spec alone.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns. An advisory allocation is not an execution instruction. No allocation is authorized by this spec alone.
no_profit_claim_policy: This spec does not imply edge and does not allocate or deploy capital.
A defined allocation baseline does not imply profit.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
An advisory allocation memo is a human-review aid, never an execution instruction.
No allocation is authorized by this spec alone (a separate compute bundle requires its own authorization).
